description:
It's summertime during his third year of high school; yet between his exam studies, his hobby, and his relationships, nothing is going well.
As he wallows in despair, 'she' suddenly appears in his dreams...

A masterpiece of great emotional depth and lovingly crafted by the creative team LIFE0 is coming to the Nintendo Switch™!

Playable in two languages!
The text can be set to English or Japanese (audio is Japanese only). This includes in-game text, options, and the digital manual. Language settings can be changed at any time.

Enjoy full HD visuals!
Experience the game in high-definition 1920x1080 resolution by playing in TV Mode.

Touch screen controls and Nintendo Switch™ Lite are also supported.

Game System
Gameplay in this choice-based visual novel involves reading through the story while making choices at certain key points. Different decisions may lead to different outcomes, story branches and endings.

Story
Igarashi Aoi is exhausted.
Day after day, he toils away studying for entrance exams at the behest of his mother while struggling to find inspiration for the novel he's been writing as a pastime.
It's summer, he's in his third year of high school, and he's started to doubt his own purpose.
He only takes solace from spending time with his childhood friend Nanase Mirai, the only person who brings him peace of mind. Yet, for some unknown reason, he gets rejected by her.
As he plunges into despair, 'she' suddenly appears in his dreams.
There, a beautiful ocean stretches into the horizon.
A lone girl stands atop the pale pink seashore.
A girl who appears in his dreams bearing the exact likeness of Nanase Mirai.

The dreams are now eating into reality...

Cast
Nanase Mirai / Kako   VA: Murakami Natsumi
Igarashi Touko   VA: Fujita Masayo
Nanase Megumi   VA: Kondo Yui
Nanase Toshiyuki   VA: Kosaka Atsushi
Kinokuniya Masaru   VA: Urata Wataru
Mr. Ebihara   VA: Ogami Shinnosuke
Yuitsuka Setsuna   VA: Yuasa Kaede
*Fully voiced (excluding the protagonist)

Staff
Scenario: Kitazaki Tom
Character Design & Original Art: Miko
